ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, moderator, admin) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or about section */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the user's social media accounts */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category for hierarchical categories */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 639-1 language code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the language was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the language was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the post */,
  "date_posted" TEXT /* Date and time the post was made */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the post */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Language of the post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who made the post */,
  "tags" TEXT /* JSON array of tags associated with the post */,
  "featured" INTEGER /* Whether the post is featured */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., live performance, educational class) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the post (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the post has received */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Post that the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "date_commented" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the comment has received */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., active, deleted, reported) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Comment that the reply is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who made the reply */,
  "reply_text" TEXT /* Text of the reply */,
  "date_replied" TEXT /* Date and time the reply was made */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the reply has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the reply has received */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reply (e.g., active, deleted, reported) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reply was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reply was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Post that the like is on */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Comment that the like is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who made the like */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of like (e.g., post, comment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who the notification is for */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "date_notified" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was made */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., comment, reply, like) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who the social media account belongs to */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform of the social media account */,
  "handle" TEXT /* Handle of the social media account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the social media account was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the social media account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Post that the file is attached to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_url" TEXT /* URL to the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Post that the analytics entry is for */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the post */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the post */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments for the post */,
  "date_analyzed" TEXT /* Date and time the analytics entry was made */,
  "user_engagement_score" INTEGER /* A score representing user engagement */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the post was shared */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analytics entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who the session belongs to */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the session was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
